name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement for the library or repository
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What use case is not served well today?

## Proposed Change

Describe the API, docs, or workflow improvement you want.

## Example

Show a small input/output example if the request affects Hangul behavior.

## Additional Context

Add links, benchmarks, or related library references if relevant.
